ink.$description: Ink — Primary text, nav links, icon strokes, image card borders, filled button background, the dominant near-black that carries the entire UI

paper.$description: Paper — Text on dark surfaces, surface highlights, card surfaces floating above the canvas, button text on filled actions

canvas.$description: Canvas — Page background, search bar fills, the warm light gray that is the base layer for everything

mist.$description: Mist — Secondary surface fills, card backgrounds, alternating bands below the canvas, muted blocks

hairline.$description: Hairline — Grid line strokes, subtle dividers, the near-invisible linework that creates the sketchpad texture

signal-green.$description: Signal Green — Green outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges

forest.$description: Forest — Deeper green for icon borders, heading underlines, secondary green accents where Signal Green would be too bright

highlight-yellow.$description: Highlight Yellow — Heading background highlight wash, warm tag fills — used as a marker-pen underline behind words, not as surface color

ember.$description: Ember — Warm card accent backgrounds, orange UI moments — the rare heat in an otherwise cool palette

swizzy.$description: The hero wordmark and large display moments. The signature choice: a 125px display at weight 500 (not 700-900), with aggressively tight -0.02em tracking and sub-1.0 line-height. The wordmark feels carved rather than printed — a confident mid-weight at enormous scale instead of a heavy slab. The slight 0.86 line-height at 125px is the signature optical correction that makes 'Flim' sit perfectly on its baseline.

pp-neue-montreal-mono.$description: The UI micro-voice: navigation labels, 'HOME', 'PRICING', 'LOG-IN', 'SIGN-UP', search bar placeholders, and the 'TRUSTED BY THE BRANDS SHAPING CULTURE' eyebrow. The wide 0.06em tracking transforms ordinary labels into engineered labels — every letter is spaced like a diagram annotation. This is the mono font's only role: small, uppercase, precisely tracked.

arial.$description: Body and secondary text. A system font is the deliberate anti-statement — body copy doesn't try to be distinctive, it just reads. 16px for body, 32px for larger sub-claims. Weight 700 for emphasis in body copy.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background — the warm light gray paper that everything sits on

surface.$description: Surface level 1: Card surfaces, search bar fills, elevated white blocks above the canvas

raised.$description: Surface level 2: Secondary surface fills, muted blocks, alternating bands

accent.$description: Surface level 3: Highlight wash behind words — the marker-pen underline

ink.$description: Surface level 4: Darkest surface — filled button, image card borders, the near-black that grounds the system
